1.0.0.description: Buffer-batched multiplexed networking layer over a single Reliable and Unreliable RemoteEvent pair. Registers named events and request/response functions by numeric ID, syncs the registry to joining clients, flushes queued packets at 61 Hz, and provides FireClient/FireAllClients/FireExcept/FireServer plus InvokeServer/InvokeClient with configurable timeouts.
